name: Albus Ferros
description_en: Albus is a relative of Camille and a senior member of Clan Ferros. He hired Jayce for inventing new 4 Skycruisers, and he's also sponsoring his Hexgate research.
description_fr: Albus est un parent de Camille et un membre senior du clan Ferros. Il a embauché Jayce pour inventer 4 nouveaux Skycruisers et il parraine également ses recherches sur Hexgate.
